type_f.name: Type F: Combatant Gear
type_f.subtitle: Treasure Generator
description: Treasure of this type represents the typical gear that might be carried by a creature that frequently finds itself in combat without the aid of spells or magic. These rewards include coins only if needed to round out the total value to an easily used number. The individual items included are determined by referring to other tables in this section. The specific table used is specified by the reward. Note that the value of some types of armor and weapons can significantly increase the value of some low-level rewards.
### Table 7-8: Type F Treasure, Combatant Gear
| 50 gp | 2d4 × 10 sp, 2d4 gp, lesser minor potion[^P] |
| 250 gp | 2d4 × 10 sp, 2d4 gp, masterwork light armor or shield[^M], lesser minor potion[^P] |
| 350 gp | 2d4 × 10 sp, 2d4 gp, masterwork medium armor[^M], lesser minor potion[^P] |
| 400 gp | 2d4 × 10 sp, 2d4 gp, masterwork weapon[^M], lesser minor potion[^P] |
| 500 gp | Masterwork weapon[^M], greater minor potion[^P] |
| 750 gp | 6d6 gp, masterwork medium armor, masterwork weapon[^M], two lesser minor potions[^P] |
| 1,500 gp | Masterwork heavy armor, masterwork weapon[^M], greater minor potion[^P] |
| 2,000 gp | Lesser minor armor[^O], masterwork weapon[^M], two greater minor potions[^P] |
| 3,000 gp | Masterwork medium armor[^M], lesser minor weapon[^X], greater minor potion[^P] |
| 4,000 gp | Lesser minor armor[^O], masterwork weapon[^M], lesser minor wondrous item, greater minor potion[^P] |
| 5,000 gp | Masterwork medium armor[^M], lesser minor weapon[^X], lesser minor wondrous item, greater minor potion[^P] |
| 6,000 gp | Lesser minor armor[^O], lesser minor weapon[^X], lesser minor wondrous item |
| 7,500 gp | Greater minor armor[^O], lesser minor weapon[^X], lesser minor ring |
| 10,000 gp | Greater minor armor[^O], lesser minor weapon[^X], lesser minor ring, lesser minor wondrous item, three greater minor potions[^P] |
| 10,000 gp | Greater minor armor[^O], greater minor weapon[^X], two greater medium potions[^P] |
| 12,500 gp | Greater minor armor[^O], lesser minor weapon[^X], greater minor wondrous item, two greater medium potions[^P] |
| 15,000 gp | Greater minor armor[^O], greater minor weapon[^X], greater minor ring |
| 20,000 gp | Lesser medium armor[^O], greater minor weapon[^X], greater minor wondrous item, two greater medium potions[^P] |
| 25,000 gp | Lesser medium armor[^O], lesser medium weapon[^X], lesser minor ring, lesser minor wondrous item, two greater medium potions[^P] |
| 30,000 gp | Lesser medium armor[^O], lesser medium weapon[^X], two lesser minor rings, greater minor wondrous items |
| 40,000 gp | Lesser medium armor[^O], lesser medium weapon[^X], lesser medium ring, greater minor wondrous item, two greater medium potions[^P] |

type_g.name: Type G: Spellcaster Gear
type_g.subtitle: Treasure Generator
description: Treasure of this type represents the typical gear that might be carried by a spellcasting creature. These rewards include coins only if needed to round out the total value to an easily used number. The individual items included are determined by referring to other tables in this section. The specific table used is specified by the reward.

type_h.name: Type H: Lair Treasure
type_h.subtitle: Treasure Generator
description: Rewards from this type of treasure represent the kinds of items that might be found in the lair of one or more creatures. Though they can be of any type, this treasure tends to include a fair number of coins and smaller magic items. The individual items included are determined by referring to other tables in this section. The specific table used is specified by the reward.
### Table 7-10: Type H Treasure, Lair Treasure

type_i.name: Type I: Treasure Hoard
type_i.subtitle: Treasure Generator
description: Rewards from this type of treasure represent the kinds of items that might be found in the vault of an entire community of creatures or in the hoard of a mighty beast such as a dragon. While this reward can include items of any type, it focuses on coins, gems, and larger, more valuable items. The individual items included are determined by referring to other tables in this section. The specific table used is specified by the reward.
### Table 7-11: Type I Treasure, Treasure Hoard
